steps.title: Use the first-to-do context
steps.content: The sentence says Bird-Walton accomplished much, but lasting historical memory especially values being the first to do something. The example says people will always remember Aloha Wanderwell because she was the first woman to drive herself around the world.

steps.title: Eliminate illogical phrases
steps.content: Choice A, “overreach by,” means go too far. Choice B, “fluctuate with,” means vary along with. Choice C, “constrain within,” means limit inside. None expresses beating or surpassing the value of being first. The phrase meaning be stronger than or outweigh fits. The answer is D.
